task_description: Expand AxonRouter to support a broad multi-provider ecosystem with provider categorization, filtering UI, category badges, explicit OpenCode Provider variants (Free, Go, Zen, Provider), provider test workflows, and stronger API routing/translation coverage.

verification.summary: All 4 validation commands pass: typecheck (0 errors), lint (0 errors/warnings), test (196 files, 1140 tests pass), build (151 pages, standalone output). Semantic review v1 found 2 actionable issues (singleton _lastModel race, compatible filter dead path) - both fixed. Cross-layer consistency verified via dedicated test.
